title: Road Gang
writer: Abem Finkel, Harold Buckley, Dalton Trumbo
actors: Donald Woods, Kay Linaker, Carlyle Moore Jr.
plot: Jim Larrabie and Bob Gordon, two reporters, are sent to prison on bogus charges after exposing the corrupt practices of J.W. Moett and Dudley. The two suffer extreme cruelty due to the sadistic behavior of the warden and guards.
